name: MHC_classI_paraC_gorilla
description: Gorilla gorilla Gogo-C paralog block. Gorilla-lineage MHC nomenclature uses 'Gogo-' prefix (e.g. Gogo-A, Gogo-B, Gogo-C). Trans-species polymorphism shared with human HLA; ape-specific paralog expansions and losses documented in Suntsova 2017 and T2T-ape 2024.

architecture.internal_structure: Ape MHC: extensive haplotype divergence, trans-species polymorphism, ape-lineage gene duplications (Patr-AL, Gogo-AL etc.).
